# Action IQ | Lob Help Center

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/action-iq#overview)

Overview


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Grow faster with a new kind of Customer Data Platform (CDP). ActionIQ’s unique composable architecture gives marketers easy and secure ways to activate data anywhere in the customer experience.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/action-iq#actioniq--lob-integrate-offline-and-online-customer-experience)

ActionIQ + Lob = Integrate Offline and Online Customer Experience


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The ActionIQ CX Hub empowers everyone to be a CX champion by giving business teams the freedom to explore and action on customer data while helping technical teams extend and enhance existing technology investments to manage data governance, costs and performance. AIQ CX Hub gives all teams direct but controlled self-service access to customer data to discover audiences and orchestrate experiences at scale.

Direct mail from Lob enables you to fully realize the CX potential of the AIQ CX Hub at the mailbox, providing flexible, automated direct mail production, delivery, and analytics, fully integrated with your CX stack.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/action-iq#eliminate-the-last-obstacle-to-omnichannel-automation)

Eliminate the Last Obstacle to Omnichannel Automation


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The AIQ CX Hub orchestrates customer journeys across all channels and touchpoints, automated across hundreds of out-of-the-box integrations. However, due to limitations of legacy direct mail tools and lack of automation offline, omnichannel orchestration fails to reach its full potential, resulting in time-consuming execution, static content disallowing personalization seen in digital channels.

Lob automates direct mail production, enabling AIQ users to send direct mail when they need it, without downstream hassles or delays. That means you can orchestrate campaigns across all channels, with precise timing, personalization, and visibility.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/action-iq#trigger-direct-mail-customer-experience-in-real-time)

Trigger Direct Mail Customer Experience in Real Time


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The ActionIQ CX Hub provides robust trigger creation and activation capabilities, enabling you to deliver real-time outbound experiences across any channel based on any signal you chose, from streaming data like abandoned carts, to historical customer profiles like total spend.

Lob brings this capability to the mailbox, with unlimited customizability, quick processing and delivery, and tracking across the entire customer journey. Giving users the ability to trigger any message, design, or form factor based on any customer signal.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/action-iq#orchestrate-and-optimize-your-campaigns)

Orchestrate and optimize your campaigns


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The AIQ CX Hub is a powerful tool for orchestration and optimization, enabling users to rapidly design, execute, test, and iterate on marketing and sales campaigns across multiple channels. However, legacy workflows and low visibility can cut direct mail out of the loop, forcing users to silo direct mail, and limit your ability to track results, improve campaign performance, and fully integrate mail into your multichannel or omnichannel workflow.

Lob’s API solves this problem, integrating fully with the AIQ CX Hub, enabling users to treat direct mail just like your digital channels. That means you can structure the customer journey, track ROI, test new strategies, and iterate your campaigns across all channels, without the need for a siloed direct mail track.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/action-iq#keep-branding-voice-and-personalization-consistent-online-and-offline)

Keep Branding, Voice and Personalization Consistent, Online and Offline


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The AIQ CX Hub provides powerful tools to shape and adapt your brand voice, while personalizing down to the microsegment. This gives you the ability to make the most of each touchpoint, while maintaining a single voice across all channels. Lob is able to then utilize all of the AIQ CX Hub intelligence to programmatically send personalized, timely, and quality mail pieces to your customers.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/action-iq#is-actioniq--lob-right-for-you)

Is ActionIQ + LOB Right for You?


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The AIQ CX Hub is designed for B2B and B2C companies with large customer bases and complex data needs across a wide range of industries, including financial services, retail, consumer packaged goods, grocery, travel & hospitality, healthcare, and B2B tech.

Lob caters to a wide range of both marketing and transactional use cases, from small businesses to multinational enterprises. For Lob users, whether or not you adopt a CX Hub depends on the factors above, as well as your use case.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/action-iq#use-cases)

Use Cases:


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Marketing direct mail:** If you need the ability to conduct multivariate testing, featuring 1-1 personalization and quick iteration capabilities, you’re more likely to benefit from a CX Hub. Typically, acquisition-focused marketing campaigns in particular can benefit from these capabilities.

**Transactional or operational mail:** Industries with heavily regulated customer communications will benefit from a CX Hub. For example, if you send financial statements, policy change notices, explanations of benefits, or bills through direct mail, a CX Hub can help ensure you’re meeting the legal requirements of each state, country, and region. Companies operating in multiple industries also tend to have complex regulatory obligations, which can benefit from the AIQ CX Hub.

# Integrations | Lob Help Center

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations#crm-cdp-map-integrations)

CRM/CDP/MAP integrations


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Customer data platforms (CDPs) serve as a source of truth for customer data, while customer relationship management systems (CRMs) manage customer relationships for sales. By using data piped from these systems, marketing automation tools can orchestrate multichannel campaigns based on the customer journey, or sequence business workflows, triggered by user actions, events, milestones, or other logic.

Lob integrations enable automated trigger-based campaigns, so you can incorporate direct mail into your omnichannel marketing campaigns and make operational workflows more efficient.

We offer customer data integrations optimized for your direct mail strategy, technology stack, and available resources.

[](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations)

# Ready to get started? | Lob Help Center

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/#welcome-to-lob)

Welcome to Lob! 👋


-----------------------------------------------------------------------

Lob's mission is to help the world send intelligent mail, one mail piece at a time. By making direct mail sends as easy as email through the use of modern APIs, Lob strives to modernize this often overlooked channel of direct communication.

Lob is a great fit for all users of direct mail from all walks of life:

*   Are you brand new to direct mail as a channel, and looking for ideas and best practices on getting started?
    
*   Are you looking to infuse direct mail automation into your existing business workflows and seeking for ways to modernize your enterprise solutions and tools?
    
*   Or are you building a highly sophisticated experimentation program using this rapidly iterative and performative channel?
    

Start at a pace you're most comfortable with, and Lob can help meet your direct mail needs, one step at a time.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/#getting-started-with-lob-0)

Getting started with Lob


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Sending mail in an accurate, reliable, and programmatic way involves the following four steps:

Audience targeting

Mail creation

Mail production

Mail delivery

The first step to any successful direct mail program is to put together an audience list for effective targeting.

Whether you are using your [own customer data](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations)
 or augmenting with third-party lists, make sure that you create targeted mailing lists with select attributes to maximize your responses and channel ROI.

Easily [upload your campaign audience list](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/reaching-your-audience/campaign-audience-guide)
 in [Lob Campaigns](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/send-mail/launch-your-first-campaign)
, or send a recipient address per mail piece in your API calls.

You can also improve the deliverability of your mail pieces by passing your addresses through Lob's [National Change of Addressarrow-up-right](https://postalpro.usps.com/mailing-and-shipping-services/NCOALink)
 functionality to reduce bad addresses, or incorporate Lob's [Address Verification](https://help.lob.com/address-verification/ready-to-start-av)
 product to fully ensure your mail data is as accurate as possible to maximize your intended reach.

Next, our [API-firstarrow-up-right](https://docs.lob.com/)
 solution provides incredible flexibility in determining [how you want to send your mail](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/building-a-mail-strategy)
: send high-volume campaigns quickly and at scale, or build automated mail sends triggered through omnichannel business workflows.

In order to use direct mail with Lob, there are three components that must be thought through to send mail via our platform:

*   **Design**: generate clear and concise instructions around what you're sending, including creative artwork and copy. Learn about [designing creatives](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives)
     in Lob.
    
*   **Data in**: pass data that determines how you want to send mail and get it delivered, including address data, merge variables for personalization, postage and delivery strategy. Learn about [building your mail strategy](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/building-a-mail-strategy)
     in Lob.
    
*   **Data out**: pass data that exports mail tracking information to enable downstream workflows or measure attribution for better performance. Learn more about how to [calibrate your mail data](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results)
     in Lob.
    

Based on your API call submission and send settings, a printer from a strategically distributed network of printers managed by Lob will fulfill your orders. Once printed, your mail orders will be handed off to USPS for delivery.

Track your mail order at each stage of production (and delivery) by utilizing our [mail tracking](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/tracking-your-mail)
, and get near real-time updates via our [webhooks](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/using-webhooks)
.

Once production is fulfilled by our printers, your mail will be on its merry way to be delivered to its final destination! Lob uses USPS for delivery in the US; as such, Lob does not have physical control over your mail once USPS has taken possession.

However, working hand-in-hand with USPS as our partner, Lob is able to provide [granular digital tracking details](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/tracking-your-mail)
 of each individual mail piece as it moves towards its destination. As the mail makes its way through every distribution or sorting facility, or arrives at the area post office, USPS will send mail tracking details to Lob. Lob will then [surface this information](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/using-webhooks)
 in near real-time, ensuring your mail pieces were delivered in a timely manner and received by the intended recipient.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/#craft-the-best-path-forward-5)

Craft the best path forward


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Depending on where you are in your quest for intelligent mail, or given your available budget or resources, there are multiple ways to leverage Lob's platform and accelerate your growth. Read on!

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/#learn-about-our-platform)

Learn about our platform

We're not your average direct mail experience. Explore Lob and see how we can meet your immediate needs for direct mail automation.

*   Dive right in: Send your [first campaign](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/send-mail/launch-your-first-campaign)
     via [our easy-to-follow dashboard UIarrow-up-right](https://dashboard.lob.com/campaigns)
     to get a feel for intelligent direct mail.
    
*   Explore our APIs! Check out our [API quickstart quide](https://help.lob.com/developer-docs/api-quickstart-guide)
     to explore our [APIs arrow-up-right](https://docs.lob.com/)
    in your preferred programming language, explore our our [Postman collectionarrow-up-right](https://www.postman.com/lobteam/workspace/lob-public-workspace/documentation/16169677-975ecb9f-ea22-4d8f-a4f9-53a42f2aee03)
    , and go to [GitHubarrow-up-right](https://www.github.com/lob)
     to access our supported SDK libraries.
    

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/#experiment-with-your-inputs-and-outputs)

Experiment with your inputs and outputs

Understand other ways in which you can up-level your direct mail program.

*   Explore how to operationalize [dynamic personalizations](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/maximizing-engagement/dynamic-personalization)
     to create mail pieces that can truly resonate with your audience
    
*   Experiment with different [methods of mail sends](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/building-a-mail-strategy/one-time-campaigns-or-triggered-sends)
     and [mail delivery strategy](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/building-a-mail-strategy/choosing-a-delivery-strategy)
     to see how to best increase relevance and conversion
    
*   Ingest [mail tracking](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/tracking-your-mail)
     data, set up notification alerts via [webhooks](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/using-webhooks)
    , or add [QR codes](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/maximizing-engagement/adding-qr-codes)
     to improve attribution and reporting
    
*   [Access](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/pricing-details)
     advanced features and more mail formats to improve audience responses as needed
    
*   Generate a campaign hypothesis, and build split-test or multivariate test cohorts to see which creative or campaign resonates with your segment
    

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/#enrich-your-data-connections-and-processes)

Enrich your data, connections, and processes

[Explore our integrations](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations)
 so you can learn how to tap into your existing tech stacks and augment your datasets to expand the possibilities of creating seamless and timely omnichannel experiences with a touch of direct mail.

circle-info

If you are a world-class technology company interested in partnering with us, [learn more herearrow-up-right](https://www.lob.com/become-a-partner)
.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/pricing-details#mail-piece-unit-pricing-3)

Mail piece unit pricing


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Recent USPS postage rate changes have taken effect as of **July 13, 2025**. These adjustments are part of USPS’s regularly scheduled pricing updates, designed to account for inflation and rising operational costs. Lob doesn’t add fees when USPS rates go up – only the postage rate increases apply. You can find more details outlined in the [USPS Press Releasearrow-up-right](https://faq.usps.com/s/article/2025-Postage-Price-Change)
.

# Adobe Marketo Engage | Lob Help Center

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/adobe-marketo-engage#overview)

Overview


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Marketoarrow-up-right](https://business.adobe.com/products/marketo/adobe-marketo.html)
 is a marketing automation platform that enables businesses to streamline and optimize their marketing processes, including lead management, email marketing, and campaign analytics.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/adobe-marketo-engage#trigger-lob-mailpieces-from-marketo-with-webhooks)

Trigger Lob mailpieces from Marketo with webhooks


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/adobe-marketo-engage#create-a-lob-webhook-within-your-marketo-instance)

Create a Lob webhook within your Marketo instance.

*   See [Marketo documentation on how to create a webhookarrow-up-right](https://experienceleague.adobe.com/docs/marketo/using/product-docs/administration/additional-integrations/create-a-webhook.html?lang=en)
    .
    
*   Keep in mind:
    

1) The URL you enter for this webhook is going to be Lob's API endpoint for the resource that you're trying to create (e.g., postcard).

2) Choose JSON as the response type for passing Lob parameters and creative data.

*   You can copy and paste the JSON from Lob’s API documentation.
    
*   In the JSON, pass Lob parameters for the recipient name and address, mapped from Marketo.
    
*   Include creative data for the content you want to send.
    

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/adobe-marketo-engage#incorporate-webhhook-into-a-campaign)

Incorporate Webhhook into a Campaign:

*   Add the webhook to a campaign in Marketo.
    
*   Define trigger conditions for when the webhook should be activated.
    
*   Example Campaign: Create a campaign to send a Lob postcard when a specific attribute (e.g., person score) changes. For instance, if a person's score changes to zero, trigger the Lob postcard webhook.
    

circle-info

For more detailed assistance, reach out to your Lob connection for personalized guidance on connecting Marketo and Lob.

[PreviousAction IQchevron-left](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/action-iq)
[NextBlueshiftchevron-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/blueshift)

Last updated 1 year ago

# Hubspot | Lob Help Center

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#overview-1)

Overview


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hubspot is a popular marketing automation software tool. In early 2022, Hubspot added Custom Code functionality to their Workflows, enabling a direct connection to Lob. Hubspot’s Workflows can be used to automatically trigger a mailpiece to be sent, via Lob.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#video-walkthrough-2)

Video walkthrough


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#step-by-step-walkthrough-3)

Step-by-step walkthrough


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#create-accounts)

Create accounts

A developer plan for testing with Lob is free, but you will need to [create a Lob accountarrow-up-right](https://dashboard.lob.com/login)
 to get your API Keys.

If you do not already have one, [create a Hubspot account herearrow-up-right](https://app.hubspot.com/signup-hubspot/crm?uuid=ff52f537-4146-48e8-8cd2-8545c26b767d&step=landing_page)
. You’ll want to enable Operations Hub / Marketing Hub Professional trial (note this lasts 14 days): **Automation > Workflows > Start 14 Day Trial**

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#create-contacts)

Create contacts

You can create manually, or import from a CSV by clicking **Contacts > Import**. From there, walk through the flow to import a file from your computer: **Start an Import > File From Computer > One File > One Object > Contacts**. Ensure your contacts have address parameters; you can [use this CSVarrow-up-right](https://s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/public.lob.com/solutions/Hubspot_demo/Hubspot_demo_Contacts_10.csv)
 as an example.

circle-exclamation

We will be creating a list in the next step, so for this walkthrough, do not select “Create a List from this Import”.

In the Map File screen, for ‘**Address2**’, select ‘**Create A New Property**’, and name it ‘**Address2**’.

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657214906676-1657214906676.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f1afde79&sv=2)

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#create-a-list-5)

Create a List

**Contacts** > **Lists** > **Create List** > Select ‘**Static**’ List > **Contact-based** > **Name your List**

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657214968352-1657214968352.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=9efb82d1&sv=2)

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#create-a-workflow-6)

Create a Workflow

Select **Automation** \> **Workflows**

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657214993021-1657214993020.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f7ae5e2e&sv=2)

Click **Create Workflow**

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657215003416-1657215003416.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=a2224505&sv=2)

Click **Contact Based** \> **Blank Workflow**

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657215023526-1657215023526.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=d4e478a5&sv=2)

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#set-up-trigger)

Set Up Trigger

For example, **List Memberships** \> **Select List you previously created** \> **Is Member of List**

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657215077013-1657215077013.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=fe327009&sv=2)

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657215087744-1657215087744.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=39fa78a5&sv=2)

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657215095521-1657215095521.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=40459d65&sv=2)

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#create-a-resulting-action-7)

Create a resulting Action

Click **+** button on Workflow, beneath the Trigger

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657215184064-1657215184064.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=df536a11&sv=2)

Select **Custom Code**

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657215201868-1657215201868.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=33c40cd5&sv=2)

Here you can select Python or NodeJS. For this example, we will select **Language: Python**. Then we will map Lob’s API fields to Hubspot properties, and enter our custom code. For this example, **Map Properties To Include in Code** as follows:

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657215276206-1657215276206.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=35bac1fd&sv=2)

Finally, enter your Python code, with properties defined as per the prior step. See example code below to test with.

#### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#example-python-code-8)

Example Python code

circle-exclamation

If copying and pasting the Python code above, it is advised to run it through a Python code validator to ensure that no formatting issues occur as a result.

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#add-your-api-keys-11)

Add your API Keys

Next we need API credentials from our Lob account. Retrieve these credentials from your Lob dashboard by clicking on the **Settings** menu on the sidebar, then clicking on the API Keys tab.

In the example Python code, replace `YOUR_API_KEY` with your **Test API Key**.

triangle-exclamation

**ENSURE YOU ARE USING YOUR TEST API KEY**

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#update-creative)

**Update Creative**

You should also replace the front and back "`HUBSPOT_CREATIVE`" with your own HTML, template IDs, or links to hosted static creatives. For example:

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#testing-9)

Testing

Make sure to hit **‘Save’.** Then you can open your custom code back up, scroll to the bottom of the panel, and click **Test Action.** Select a contact, and click **Test** to fire off a test request. ![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1657216126527-1657216126527.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=f14f8acd&sv=2)

You can then log into your Lob account to verify that a mailpiece was generated.

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot#utilizing-workflow-10)

Utilizing workflow

Once you’ve tested, you can **Publish** your workflow. From there, it will run whenever the trigger you set is fired. For example, if you followed the above example, you can now add some contacts to your list. This should automatically create mailpieces for each person on the list.

Now you can replace the Test API key in your Python code with your Base64 Encoded Live API Key, and your Automation is live. If you are using other test resources like address IDs or template IDs, those will also need to be transferred to your live environment.

[PreviousCustomer.iochevron-left](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io)
[NextIterablechevron-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/iterable)

Copy

    import requests
    import json
    import base64
    import os
    from hubspot import HubSpot
    from hubspot.crm.contacts import ApiException
    from requests.adapters import HTTPAdapter
    from urllib3.util.retry import Retry
    
    
    def retry_session(retries, session=None, backoff_factor=1):
        session = session or requests.Session()
        retry = Retry(
            total=retries,
            read=retries,
            connect=retries,
            backoff_factor=backoff_factor,
            status_forcelist=[500, 502, 503, 504, 429],
            allowed_methods=['POST']
        )
        adapter = HTTPAdapter(max_retries=retry)
        session.mount('http://', adapter)
        session.mount('https://', adapter)
        return session
    
    
    def main(event):
        address = event.get('inputFields').get('address')
        address2 = event.get('inputFields').get('address2')
        city = event.get('inputFields').get('city')
        state = event.get('inputFields').get('state')
        zip_code = event.get('inputFields').get('zip_code')
        email = event.get('inputFields').get('email')
        hs_object_id = event.get('inputFields').get('hs_object_id')
        phone = event.get('inputFields').get('phone')
        firstname = event.get('inputFields').get('firstname')
        lastname = event.get('inputFields').get('lastname')
    
        url = "https://api.lob.com/v1/postcards"
    
        payload = {
            "description": "HUBSPOT DEMO POSTCARD",
            "to[name]": firstname + ' ' + lastname,
            "to[address_line1]": address,
            "to[address_line2]": address2,
            "to[address_city]": city,
            "to[address_state]": state,
            "to[address_zip]": zip_code,
            "front": "https://s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/public.lob.com/solutions/retail_pdfs/4x6+Retail+front.pdf",
            "back": "https://s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/public.lob.com/solutions/retail_pdfs/4x6+Retail+back.pdf",
            "size": "4x6",
            "metadata[customer_id]": hs_object_id,
            "metadata[campaign]": "HUBSPOT_TEST",
            "metadata[phone]": phone,
            "metadata[email]": email,
            "metadata[front_creative_name]": "demo_hubspot_front_creative",
            "metadata[back_creative_name]": "demo_hubspot_back_creative",
            "metadata[address_city]": city,
            "metadata[address_state]": state,
            "metadata[address_zip]": zip_code
        }
    
        session = retry_session(retries=5)
        r = session.post(url, auth=requests.auth.HTTPBasicAuth(YOUR_API_KEY, ''), data=payload)
        j = r.json()
        print(j)

# Iterable | Lob Help Center

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/iterable#integration-overview-0)

Overview


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Iterablearrow-up-right](https://iterable.com/)
 is a cross-channel marketing platform that powers unified customer experiences and empowers you to create, optimize and measure every interaction across the entire customer journey. Automated connections in Iterable, called (Journey) Webhooks, can be set up in minutes with no coding. Webhooks can automate your day-to-day tasks and enable workflows with Lob that otherwise wouldn't be possible.

Each Webhook you create will connect to an HTML template that you have stored in your Lob account. You will map your Iterable data fields to the dynamic Lob merge variables in the HTML template, and trigger mail sends via either an individual user action (such as email unsubscribe, for example) or to a group of users via a batch send.

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/iterable#getting-started-with-iterable-1)

Getting started with Iterable

To get started with Iterable, you will need to sign up directly with Iterable (see [Request Demoarrow-up-right](https://iterable.com/)
) or have your Iterable account enabled by your company.

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/iterable#getting-started-with-lob-2)

Getting started with Lob

[Sign uparrow-up-right](https://dashboard.lob.com/#/register)
 for a free Lob account; from there you can jump right in with sending requests for free with your secret [Test API keyarrow-up-right](https://dashboard.lob.com/#/settings/keys)
. Instantly begin sending real mail by simply adding a payment method to your account and switching to your Live API key.

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/iterable#connecting-iterable-to-lob-3)

Connecting Iterable to Lob

1.  [Loginarrow-up-right](https://app.iterable.com/login)
     to your Iterable Account.
    
2.  Navigate to "Integrations" -> “Journey Webhooks”
    
    ![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252F9Xufl9UapYzM2lA3Luol%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3D85070053-266d-4813-b1a2-cc2900dab7a0&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=df5d4c29&sv=2)
    
3.  Now click on "New Webhook" near the top of the page.
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Flh4.googleusercontent.com%2FLcI_NdedMr_0hFnLkEt98yy_BTamRuIsPvs4bJ6XtfbPdbVxyJDFZGHzep61__X41FdJElEaVRhLe9qShFjm-acBm9bEiDjxX2ulrhAGD6Y3qCD21PJh5mOnhJZdfc50mdUF8FEXeJk4p5TDOBd7IawvYW7irzQ_Brf8htdOQ_6XLipkczft8I6PMGOf&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=96ecd246&sv=2)

4\. Configure as follows:

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FMQmWt3ZXYX15IWIxzce1%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd7ae6757-156c-4f51-87e2-487374b8eb50&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=bb5bd39e&sv=2)

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FMQmWt3ZXYX15IWIxzce1%252Fimage.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dd7ae6757-156c-4f51-87e2-487374b8eb50&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=bb5bd39e&sv=2)

a. Endpoint: Make sure the URL matches the resource you want to create (i.e., that you are sending postcard requests to the postcard endpoint). See URLs [herearrow-up-right](https://docs.lob.com/#letters_create)
.

b. Authentication: None

c. Custom headers: Use the Authorization Header and your Base64 Encoded [API keyarrow-up-right](https://dashboard.lob.com/#/settings/keys)
 to connect your Lob account

*   We recommend using your Test Lob API Key in order to test and validate your integration. Then switch to your Live API key when you are ready to send mail.
    
*   You can use a [Base64 Encoder toolarrow-up-right](https://www.base64encode.org/)
     to encode your (test) API Key.
    
*   Use the encoded key as the value for the `Authorization` header and that you are **base64-encoding your secret API key with a colon after the key.** For example, the API key `test_abc123` should be encoded as `test_abc123:`, which becomes `dGVzdF9hYmMxMjM6`.
    

d. Body: select ‘URL-encoded Form’, then add form fields below to map the [required Lob parameters arrow-up-right](https://docs.lob.com/#operation/postcard_create)
to the associated attributes within Iterable. Example:

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Flh5.googleusercontent.com%2FT8P-GtTWbl7mkRBZfRtQgrvmaIeQ75Eoo0PE5xccll7Aov8cm7DorsP2X9K5C7cXOm3W7D72TO3SBSg8DAAuApmkHFltizTtrYzRkcdLIY5v7Glpk8TW5mgVjodVRVJ_9lrQT3_oJZkLNJcyOaK9_dq7vcsHR69h-iO5ciHb01T2JmS7Z-YaIAADjIN3&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=5d92be40&sv=2)

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Flh5.googleusercontent.com%2FT8P-GtTWbl7mkRBZfRtQgrvmaIeQ75Eoo0PE5xccll7Aov8cm7DorsP2X9K5C7cXOm3W7D72TO3SBSg8DAAuApmkHFltizTtrYzRkcdLIY5v7Glpk8TW5mgVjodVRVJ_9lrQT3_oJZkLNJcyOaK9_dq7vcsHR69h-iO5ciHb01T2JmS7Z-YaIAADjIN3&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=5d92be40&sv=2)

*   The fields on the left are the required Lob request parameters, and your corresponding data fields are on the right.
    
*   The right column is where you can dynamically map to Iterable attributes, by using the corresponding Iterable variable for a given attribute.
    
*   Iterable variables will need to be enclosed like so: {{your\_variable}}. For example, if you have a field that maps to “to{name}” in your data and you want the variable first\_name to be used as that mapping, you would put {{first\_name}} next to the “to{name}” field on this page.
    
*   Be sure to map to all of the necessary merge variables. For example, if you have a merge variable “name” in your template you need to add a form field of “merge\_variables\[name\]” and set the desired value on the right.
    

5\. Click 'Create Webhook.'

6\. Ensure you are mapping all the required templates.

*   Postcards and Self-Mailers will utilize two templates, one each for the front and back of the postcards.
    
*   Letters have just one template, mapped to the parameter ‘file’ on the left side.
    

7\. Click 'Save' on the right when you are finished.

8\. Navigate "Messenging" -> "Journeys" (previously called “Workflows”)

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Flh3.googleusercontent.com%2FRU0vDsRebcY0vTM3gl_bZfiDzdPrSUf0_XdCGk-juHyL17j7m7g3OAUF2VXErEZySG8tFqpxM6xq2iQsylzn9q97rCRnhsWqQACGqb0T1rbsKNaKW9EQoli71GMxHGFCYGHypl0McqP0c8vkSrlMMZWOdIzoX9sKU-oYdCbh7OlNRHA_eOrMP0YvG1vY&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=66c296e4&sv=2)

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Flh3.googleusercontent.com%2FRU0vDsRebcY0vTM3gl_bZfiDzdPrSUf0_XdCGk-juHyL17j7m7g3OAUF2VXErEZySG8tFqpxM6xq2iQsylzn9q97rCRnhsWqQACGqb0T1rbsKNaKW9EQoli71GMxHGFCYGHypl0McqP0c8vkSrlMMZWOdIzoX9sKU-oYdCbh7OlNRHA_eOrMP0YvG1vY&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=66c296e4&sv=2)

9\. Click on the Journey you want to incorporate this webhook into, or create a new Journey.

10\. Find the event that will trigger your Lob webhook (for example, a customer is Added to a List, or opened an email), then drag in the “Call Webhook” tile and place it after that event in the Journey.

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Flh3.googleusercontent.com%2FYAs0qJykGJqInxWwvTN73-Eg3TMCLsmdDbjSUolBYzYYdFN_6vmBG_-ZKm-fhhRVV2_N2LNeATFaQSQ4I8CjLDZwr88WNpN7D1Wmjb4faK_npJfLWto460KWENn4nvmTQh_4JNKFIYiK0wWiDLhjJ9rkIk-glol9xj70cQ54CVnEW85j9E6Mt2NNDiHB&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=808b1014&sv=2)

11\. Open up that Webhook, and toggle on ‘Use Preset Journey Webhook’, then select the webhook you have created.

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Flh4.googleusercontent.com%2F-YRyf3QVO2EJhWKgtnxmr6t_A5JBArsaEwgDvYpsdoUQkpwvHeGRDQAJYSQKrP3NzY3brysGdoYErTX3B3eQABAOqZZgbjYnJM5yMeXmSe_V3XLEw6-5Bk_-aLwFsd_i4oYPs6VIxpxnPcIohe1WYcz1YRtIcn4BKDTwcChhL4nwpzXhetfa0QrueKRV&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=770ef815&sv=2)

12\. After you have successfully set up your Journey, send a test trigger by clicking on ‘Test Journey’. Check to see whether Iterable notes any errors.

13\. Assuming no errors were caught, head over to your Lob [dashboardarrow-up-right](https://dashboard.lob.com/)
 and verify the results of the test. (Reach out to your CSM if you need assistance navigating the Lob dashboard.)

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/iterable#best-practices-4)

Best practices


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/iterable#api-keys)

API Keys

We strongly recommend testing any planned mail sends and webhooks by **first using your Test Lob API Keys, and ensuring that the resulting records created in Lob match your expectations**. Only then should you proceed to use your Live Lob API Key to actually generate mail.

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/iterable#html-creatives)

HTML creatives

To leverage HTML creatives in Lob, you will want to save your HTML as a template within Lob, or host your HTML and generate a corresponding hosting URL. These can be passed to Lob from Iterable, but you are not able to pass a full HTML string directly to Lob from Iterable.

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/iterable#iterable-journeys)

Iterable Journeys

There are 3 common scenarios in which Iterable Journeys trigger Lob mail sends:

1.  Single, triggered mailpieces from individual user actions. For example, someone unsubscribes to an email list, then a message is sent to Lob to trigger a single mailpiece.
    
2.  A regular job is run, resulting in mail being sent to all users who meet specific criteria.
    
3.  An audience list is exported from Iterable and uploaded to Lob, and mail is generated for each user in the list.
    

These scenarios all result in different volumes of mail requests being sent to Lob in a single batch, and there are some best practices for ensuring your integration is seamless for each batch size.

For any send types that will trigger fewer than 500 mailpieces in a single batch, as is typically the case with the first scenario above, you won’t need to take any additional steps to those listed above in this doc. However, for the second and third scenarios, in which single sends will contain more than 500 mailpieces, it is recommended that you connect with your Lob representative to discuss leveraging a Lob solution to manage non-rate-limited requests from Iterable.

Additionally, for the second and third scenarios above, you can take some additional steps to ensure that all requests reach Lob within the rate limit. For example, one possible workflow enhancement for batches typically between 500-3000 mailpieces is to include audience splits in the customer journey, with delays included to stagger the sends to Lob, thus reducing rate limiting errors. For large batches, it is also an option to export the audience list from Iterable and send it via Lob’s Campaign Dashboard, as it is purpose-built to handle batch sizes into the millions, and will ensure that all expected mail is generated.

**Either way, if you expect to send batches above 500 mailpieces at a time, it’s beneficial to connect with your Lob representative so that we can walk through the best solution for sending at scale while preserving the automation benefits of connecting through Iterable.**

[PreviousHubspotchevron-left](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot)

# Fast Track Guide | Lob Help Center

Even though the USPS loves working with us, they still have to charge for sending mail. Even if you are on the Developer edition of Lob, before you get started we'll ask you to input your payment information, then add [Lob Credits](https://help.lob.com/account-management/billing/lob-credits)
, so you are prepared to send mail!

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#step-1-how-do-you-plan-to-execute-your-mail)

Step 1: How do you plan to execute your mail?


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

chevron-rightIn the Lob dashboard[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#in-the-lob-dashboard)

*   Send mail via [Campaigns](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/reaching-your-audience/campaign-audience-guide)
    , our user-friendly interface built atop our APIs. We support one-time (1:many, targeted outreach), or automated (1:1, based on a trigger) campaigns.
    

chevron-rightProgrammatically[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#programmatically)

*   [API Documentationarrow-up-right](https://docs.lob.com/)
     - Every developer knows that the path to getting a successful integration up and running starts here. You’ll be provided an example of each type of Lob API request and response, so you can build an integration that works for you/your team.
    
*   [Campaigns APIarrow-up-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/building-a-mail-strategy/campaign-or-triggered-sends/send-campaigns-via-the-api)
     - What if you want to send large-scale direct mail campaigns but don’t want to execute them manually via the campaign tool? Well, you’re in luck! Learn how you can achieve the same efficiency but via the Campaigns API so you can automate your sends.
    

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#step-2-who-are-you-sending-to)

Step 2: Who are you sending to?


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

chevron-rightAudience [hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#audience)

*   For a one-time campaign, you'll need your audience data (.csv); see here for how to [format your addresses](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/reaching-your-audience/all-about-addresses)
    .
    
*   To set up and send automated or triggered campaigns, you'll want to connect directly to you customer data. Learn more about our Integrations here.
    

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#step-3-what-creative-type-are-you-going-to-be-using)

Step 3: What creative type are you going to be using?


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

chevron-right**HTML**[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#html)

*   [Dynamic Personalizationarrow-up-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/dynamic-personalization)
     - One of the most powerful tools you have available to you when sending direct mail with Lob is the ability to make every piece unique to each recipient. Here are some tips on how to get the most out of Lob’s HTML capabilities.
    
*   [Design Specificationsarrow-up-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/mail-piece-design-specs)
     - Whether you are sending a single postcard or millions of letters, our design guidelines will ensure your direct mail designs are created in the correct layouts and dimensions, so they’ll render exactly as expected when produced.
    
*   [Best Direct Mail Campaignsarrow-up-right](https://www.lob.com/best-direct-mail-campaigns)
     - Get inspired by campaign examples from some of the best of the best.
    
*   [Template Galleryarrow-up-right](https://www.lob.com/template-gallery)
     - Not sure where to start? We’ve got you covered. Hit the ground running with several pre-made examples and even use them as a foundation to build your creatives.
    

chevron-rightPDF[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#pdf)

*   [Artboard Layout arrow-up-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/creative-formatting#pdf-guidelines-14)
    \- Here are some design layout and dimension guides you’ll want to keep in mind.
    
*   [Creative Formatting](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/creative-formatting)
     - Learn more about formatting and ensuring your [artwork is print-ready](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/creative-formatting/pdf-preflight-checklist)
    .
    
*   [Template Galleryarrow-up-right](https://www.lob.com/template-gallery)
     - Not sure where to start? We’ve got you covered. Here you can take inspiration from several pre-made examples and even use them as a foundation to build your own unique creative
    

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#step-4-how-do-you-plan-to-measure-the-success-of-your-mail)

Step 4: How do you plan to measure the success of your mail?


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

chevron-rightLob dashboard[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#lob-dashboard)

*   [Tracking](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/tracking-your-mail)
     - One of the most powerful advantages of using Lob is that you can have visibility of any individual mail piece as it moves across the entire print production and delivery process.
    
*   [Mail Analyticsarrow-up-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/mail-analytics)
     - Every team measures unique insights to ensure you hit your targets. Discover a few views that cover some of the most important metrics you should care about.
    
*   [Metadataarrow-up-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/building-a-mail-strategy/managing-mail-settings/using-metadata)
     - Gain a deeper understanding of your mail data at a mail piece, recipient, batch, or campaign level by adding your own data labels.
    

chevron-rightCustom analytics[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/ready-to-get-started/fast-track-guide#custom-analytics)

*   [Webhooksarrow-up-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/using-webhooks)
     - Leverage webhook functionality to take asynchronous action and enhance your line of sight for the mail that is requested.
    
*   [Metadataarrow-up-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/building-a-mail-strategy/managing-mail-settings/using-metadata)
     - Gain a deeper understanding of your mail data at a mail piece, recipient, batch, or campaign level by adding your own data labels.

# Braze | Lob Help Center

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#braze-integration-0)

Overview


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Use the following as an addendum to the [Braze integration documentationarrow-up-right](https://www.braze.com/docs/partners/additional_channels/direct_mail/lob/)
 for using Lob with Braze.

This integration will allow customers to send data from Braze to Lob. A pre-designed webhook can then be used within a campaign to trigger mail to customers. After sending through Braze, the mail data can be accessed from within the Lob dashboard.

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#step-1-add-custom-attributes-1)

Step 1 - Add Custom Attributes

Add Custom Attributes for user mailing address information:

*   `address_line1`
    
*   `address_line2`
    
*   `address_city`
    
*   `address_state`
    
*   `address_zip`
    
*   `address_country`
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1629290211764-1629290211764.png&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=2cae5169&sv=2)

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#step-2-update-user-profiles-2)

Step 2 - Update user profiles

Update user profiles with mailing addresses.

[Import CSVarrow-up-right](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/data_and_analytics/user_data_collection/user_import/#importing-custom-data-via-csv)
:

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1629290256122-1629290256122.png&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=74eaa045&sv=2)

[API callarrow-up-right](https://www.braze.com/docs/api/endpoints/user_data/)
:

Anything highlighted is a custom variable that will need to be updated for each customer or use case.

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1629290340267-1629290340267.png&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=1d2064b5&sv=2)

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#step-3-create-a-webhook-template-3)

Step 3 - Create a webhook template

Create a webhook template ([Braze Documentationarrow-up-right](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/message_building_by_channel/webhooks/webhook_template/)
). Once this template is made it can be used for your future campaigns as well. In the case that you have different variations of sends, meaning you are going to perform one send with postcards and one with letters it is recommended that you create 2 separate webhook templates in Braze for this.

Additionally, if you are going to be doing small variations such as sending first-class vs standard class depending on the recipient, then you can leverage Braze's [conditional logicarrow-up-right](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/personalization_and_dynamic_content/liquid/conditional_logic/)
. You can build this logic into the template and have one webhook template support multiple variations.

#### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#example-postcard-4)

Example postcard

**Compose tab:**

Webhook URL: `https://api.lob.com/v1/postcards`

Request body: Raw Text

circle-exclamation

Braze's default webhook template does not include the opening and closing `{}` brackets, so ensure those have been added before saving.

#### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#example-letter-5)

Example letter

**Compose tab:**

Webhook URL: `https://api.lob.com/v1/letters`

Request body: Raw Text

#### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#example-self-mailer-6)

Example self-mailer

**Compose tab:**

Webhook URL: `https://api.lob.com/v1/self_mailers`

Request body: Raw Text

#### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#settings-tab-7)

**Settings tab**

_**Be sure to leave the**_ `**:**` _**after the Lob API key you paste in between the apostrophes.**_

REQUEST HEADERS:

*   Authorization: Basic `{{ 'YOUR_LOB_API_KEY:' | base64_encode }}`
    
*   Content-Type: `application/json`
    
*   Idempotency-Key: `{{${user_id}}}`
    
    *   It is recommended that you leverage idempotency keys to prevent duplication of mail being sent. It can be any value you seem fit but often it is userID or a combination of userID and campaign name.
        
    
*   HTTP METHOD: `POST`
    

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#step-4-test-your-new-webhook-8)

Step 4 - Test your new webhook

Test your new webhook template and check your Lob dashboard to ensure desired results. It is recommended to run a one-off test in Braze to see if the request format is set up appropriately and then run a full end-to-end test where you send an entire campaign through your test environment.

#### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#running-a-one-off-test-9)

Running a one-off test

When running a one-off test it is useful to have test users in your system who have the correct data needed to send mail and validate your creatives. Here is an example of a test we would perform.

#### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#common-errors-10)

Common errors

1.  **401 Unauthorized**
    
    *   If you receive this error message, your API key is incorrect.
        
    *   Make sure you have the header `Authorization` and that you are encoding your secret API key with a colon after the key like this `Basic {{ 'YOUR_LOB_API_KEY:' | base64_encode }}` ![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.helpjuice.com%2Fhelpjuice_production%2Fuploads%2Fupload%2Fimage%2F9583%2Fdirect%2F1655832228030-Screen%2520Shot%25202022-06-21%2520at%252010.23.43%2520AM.png&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=85c913b4&sv=2)
        
    
2.  **422 Unprocessable Entity** (Invalid request payload JSON format)
    
    *   If you receive this error, it is likely that your payload is not formatted correctly. It needs to match JSON formatting.
        
    *   Generally speaking, the rules that are often broken are:
        
        1.  All keys and values are enclosed in double quotes (`"`).
            
        2.  Commas after every key-value pair except for the last one.
            
        3.  No newline characters in any values and no extra spaces between fields.
            
        
    
3.  **422 Unprocessable Entity** (Other)
    
    *   Other than JSON errors, you can receive `422` errors in the payload sent to Lob does not match our requirements.
        
    *   For example, if you are missing `address_line1` in the payload you will get an error saying that is needed. For these errors, you can make the appropriate adjustments and retry your requests.
        
    

circle-exclamation

The "testing" functionality in Braze is sending a one-off request to Lob, this means if you have your **LIVE API key** in the template it **will create mail** and if you have your **test key** it will **not.**

Make sure when you are testing that your cancellation windows are set to an ample time (2 hours is recommended) to make sure you can always cancel mail if you make a mistake.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#faqs-11)

FAQs


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#how-do-i-use-merge-variables-from-braze)

**How do I use merge variables from Braze?**

To leverage merge variables, in Braze you will reference the merge variable in your HTML file as the Key and the user attribute as the value.

For example, if you had a merge variable called `f_name` in your HTML, then in the section of your payload called `merge_variables` you would have a key of `f_name` and a value of the user attribute in Braze. Here is an example of what that would look like in Braze

#### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#what-do-i-use-for-the-file-parameter-for-letters-what-do-i-use-for-the-front-and-back-parameters-for)

**What do I use for the file parameter for letters? What do I use for the front and back parameters for postcards?**

See more information on file format types [here](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/creative-formatting)

Essentially you can either host your HTML in the Lob platform where you can then reference the template ID that is created for you, or you can leverage Braze’s [Media Libraryarrow-up-right](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/engagement_tools/templates_and_media/media_library/)
 where you will be provided with a URL that can be used as the value for these parameters.

Here is an example of what you could see in Braze:

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#capturing-lob-webhook-data-in-braze)

Capturing Lob webhook data in Braze


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Braze’s Data Transformation tool enables you to capture webhook events from Lob, and use them to either update Attributes or create Events within Braze.

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Flh7-us.googleusercontent.com%2Foc5jyWfK1KFZnJbeIqAZ8MfPwObJ7B5kF6ajV4I0yZDAvCJ3PaESJyGmzltxw8CVAhC-z_v6ChWnbDotwwyuQ6ABcQUPz8XKh3or37r-e0KnWFcKUyjitxc_EkH_OJy5He-JhrZjPxCWvpUOAnZcRPY&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=844fa6e5&sv=2)

**Steps:**

1.  Set up a Data Transformation in Braze. This will generate a Webhook URL you can use to pass events into Braze.
    
    *   See [Braze’s documentation on utilizing Data Transformationsarrow-up-right](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/data/data_transformation/overview)
        
    
2.  Create [Lob Webhook](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/using-webhooks)
     for the events you want to track, using the Braze-provided URL
    
3.  Set up the Transformation Code in Braze to listen for the event. You can use this to either update an Attribute or generate an Event.
    
    *   See Example 1 below for a 'Letter Viewed' example, in which it both updates an attribute within Braze and creates an Event.
        
    
4.  Send a Test webhook and check the resulting Output to ensure the data is successfully being captured, and the subsequent attribute/event updates are occurring within Braze
    

**Example 1:** Braze Transformation Code for Letter Viewed, which updates the attribute 'external\_id' and generates an Event named 'Letter Viewed' when the webhook from Lob is received:

**Example 2:** Braze transformation output after webhook received, showing the updated attribute 'external\_id' and creating the Event 'Letter Viewed'.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#notes-and-external-links-15)

Other Resources


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#advanced-logic)

**Advanced logic**

*   String manipulation, date formatting, etc. See Braze’s [Liquid documentationarrow-up-right](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/personalization_and_dynamic_content/liquid)
    .

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#idempotent-requests)

*   See Managing mail settings > [Idempotent requests](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/building-a-mail-strategy/managing-mail-settings#idempotent-requests-12)
    

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze#rate-limiting)

**Rate limiting**

*   By default, all accounts and their corresponding Test and Live API Keys have a rate limit of 150 requests per 5 seconds per endpoint
    
*   [Lob API docs: Rate Limitingarrow-up-right](https://docs.lob.com/#rate-limits)
    
*   [Braze user guide: Rate limitingarrow-up-right](https://www.braze.com/docs/user_guide/engagement_tools/campaigns/testing_and_more/rate-limiting/#delivery-speed-rate-limiting)

# Customer.io | Lob Help Center

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#overview)

Overview


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Customer.ioarrow-up-right](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://customer.io/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1691079263209479&usg=AOvVaw3FdohfMkzq387BZvQWEAAT)
 is a popular messaging automation platform that empowers its customers to create personalized message flows to engage their audience. Traditionally these have been channels like email and SMS. However, with Lob, you can bring Intelligent Mail into your omnichannel customer journey and manage it just as easily as your digital channels.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#h.k6tfst9gjk6j)

Getting Started


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Log into your [Lob accountarrow-up-right](https://dashboard.lob.com/login)
    . To start you’ll need your [API keys](https://help.lob.com/account-management/api-keys)
    . It is highly recommended that you use your (secret) test API key first for testing.
    
2.  Have a [creative file](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/creative-formatting)
     (HTML template) ready to use.
    
3.  Sign in to your [arrow-up-right](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://app.segment.com/login&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1691079263210798&usg=AOvVaw3t109-cXDS8Hc-6tc5UvUU)
    [Customer.io account. arrow-up-right](https://fly.customer.io/login)
    

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#h.ixxbnk6m8af7)

Create a Campaign in Customer.io


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We will be bringing Lob into Customer.io within the Workflow step of a Campaign. In order to set up a Workflow, you will need to first create the Campaign within Customer.io and configure your Trigger, Settings, and Goal & Exit steps. Complete instructions on this can be found in [Customer.io’s documentation here. arrow-up-right](https://customer.io/docs/journeys/campaigns-in-customerio/)

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FnruMeSj2yZkhcP40f8SH%252Fimage1.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=ba532dc1&sv=2)

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#h.15uaa7ii4d4p)

Setting up your Workflow


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Once you reach the workflow screen, you can begin crafting your customer journey by creating the event path your users will follow. Below is a standard example of an event trigger (User Purchase) followed by a standard Welcome Email.
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FovZvECrusZXOadq7xCW3%252Fimage8.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=56786dc8&sv=2)

1.  We can incorporate Intelligent Mail into this Workflow in a similar manner to email by adding a Webhook node. We can do this by dragging in a Send And Receive Data tile from the left-side menu.
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FKTg23JaY1BMxTIdlDWKF%252Fimage9.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=e54c362d&sv=2)

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252F2WKiVQ78nySLbwbcCog9%252Fimage6.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4622117f&sv=2)

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#h.jt4g0d29xhxs)

Configuring Your Webhook


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Now you will have an empty webhook, which you can configure by clicking to open it. This will open an edit screen in the left panel. You can find [Customer.io documentation on webhook setup here.arrow-up-right](https://customer.io/docs/journeys/webhooks-action/)
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FRwniYw3Ypepj9afBB3HE%252Fimage3.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=7f3d8618&sv=2)

1.  You can configure it as follows:
    

*   Webhook Name: The Description of your Mail Event
    
*   Add Request: This is where we will add the Lob Endpoint URL and the JSON code that will format the information being passed from Customer.io to Lob. More details on this below in [Configuring Your Webhook Request.](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#h.2vtxb6k92x1z)
    
*   Sending Behavior: Send automatically
    

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#h.2vtxb6k92x1z)

Configuring Your Webhook Request


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Click on Add Request to begin the setup process.
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FkCZhw589850RWo47iyGl%252Fimage5.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=d6db2aed&sv=2)

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252F4q5kjW82JaFXk2xZhvLh%252Fimage12.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=300&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=c42a1117&sv=2)

1.  Next to POST, you will construct the Lob endpoint URL for the type of resource you are trying to create.
    

*   The format is as follows: **https://+\[YOUR LOB API KEY\][\[email protected\]](https://help.lob.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)
    /v1/\[RESOURCE TYPE\]**
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252Fnoj0TyXWMjF72WnkCFDQ%252Fimage4.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=dd5053a9&sv=2)

example

*   Your **API key** will be either your Test or Live [API keyarrow-up-right](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://dashboard.lob.com/settings/api-keys&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1691079263214592&usg=AOvVaw0shdhxaY1_3asC-H73vQmW)
    , which you can find in your Lob dashboard under Settings. It is strongly recommended that you begin with your Test API Key to ensure it is working, before switching to your Live API Key.
    
*   The **Resource Type** will depend on the mail format you are trying to send. For example, postcards, letters, or self\_mailers. You can find all of the available resource types in [Lob’s API documentationarrow-up-right](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://docs.lob.com&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1691079263215199&usg=AOvVaw0OI0ZzeQ85tP6ATVKUPJNG)
    .
    

1.  In the black box, you will construct your JSON to pass the required information to Lob’s API to generate a mailpiece. For example, see [Postcard > Create in Lob’s API documentation.arrow-up-right](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://docs.lob.com/%23tag/Postcards/operation/postcard_create&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1691079263215580&usg=AOvVaw1JutzE3BRQxZzMPgPKgDye)
    
2.  You will pass in the Customer attributes to populate this by using [Liquid Statementsarrow-up-right](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://customer.io/docs/journeys/using-liquid/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1691079263215931&usg=AOvVaw1yFnIew6EL7WiLXIcRY27W)
    .
    

This will enable to you not only pass in the recipient’s name and address, but also personalize your mailpiece by using Liquid to populate dynamic merge variables. ([More information on creating personalized HTML templatesarrow-up-right](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/designing-mail-creatives/dynamic-personalization&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1691079263216302&usg=AOvVaw2Vv-N8aBYtMdV8fYa5Gmc5)
.)

### 

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#sample-json)

Sample JSON

Below is sample JSON you can test within your Customer.io webhook.

circle-check

Before testing this, replace the front and back with template IDs from your own Lob account.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#h.errpzi4m56ck)

Testing


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Once your webhook has been configured, you will want to test it.

circle-exclamation

Remember that you should be using your Test API Key for this, as you will otherwise generate live mail.

1.  You can send a test by opening up the Request and clicking on Send Test in the top right corner.
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FjVDFcnp2gzmduYyNFln0%252Fimage13.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=116ddf50&sv=2)

1.  Once you confirm and send, you will want to see a 200 OK response in your Test Results. This will indicate that the request has successfully reached Lob.
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252F2mlWsp9sDh4m1QNiO6ah%252Fimage2.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=feda5145&sv=2)

1.  You can also check the Test Results to ensure the request fields were correctly populated by the Liquid Statements.
    
2.  You can then log into your Lob account to verify that the mailipiece was successfully generated. Preview it to make sure all of the details are correct. If so, then you have successfully set up your Customer.io to Lob integration, and are ready to send Live Intelligent Mail.
    

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/customer.io#h.y8nb572n00pp)

Ingesting Mail Tracking Events from Lob into Customer.io


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

circle-info

[See here for more info on using Webhooks with Lob.](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/getting-data-and-results/using-webhooks)

You can set up Webhooks within Lob to pass mail events (for example, Postcard Delivered) from Lob into Customer.io by using [Customer.io’s Webhook Triggered Campaignsarrow-up-right](https://customer.io/docs/journeys/webhook-triggered-campaigns/)
.

1.  Start by creating a new Campaign within Customer.io and select: Create Your Own Trigger From A Webhook as the trigger.
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FahhM7M6uvCE3X0tdw7ms%252Fimage7.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=4eaf2ba5&sv=2)

1.  This will generate a URL to catch the webhook. Copy that to use within Lob in the next step.
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252F2DNw2wXhAAmm4mNRHcRG%252Fimage11.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=334ace3d&sv=2)

1.  Navigate to [Webhooks within the Lob dashboardarrow-up-right](https://dashboard.lob.com/webhooks/create)
     to set up the webhook event you want to capture.
    
2.  Under Create A New Webhook, enter a webhook description and paste in the URL generated by Customer.io.
    
3.  Finally, select the event you want to capture in Customer.io.
    

![](https://help.lob.com/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1775164782-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FiXDYGxBp6aAwhpEhTMNC%252Fuploads%252FKqQ9ESYTnUoxjacGYliw%252Fimage10.png%3Falt%3Dmedia&width=768&dpr=3&quality=100&sign=1e689bfa&sv=2)

1.  From here you can use the data on the incoming webhook to track as events or update attributes for users within Customer.io. This also enables you to trigger subsequent events—for example, you can imagine an omnichannel customer journey in which a customer receives a Lob postcard, and that automatically triggers an email to that same customer telling them to check their mailbox for a great offer.
    

Once you have incorporated both sending Lob mail and capturing Lob events within Customer.io, you will have truly automated direct mail, and integrated within your broader digital customer journeys.

[PreviousBrazechevron-left](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/braze)
[NextHubspotchevron-right](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/hubspot)

Last updated 1 year ago

# Jotform | Lob Help Center

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/jotform#overview)

Overview


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[JotFormarrow-up-right](https://www.jotform.com/)
 is an easy-to-use online tool for creating forms, surveys, and questionnaires without needing any coding skills. With its drag-and-drop interface, you can quickly design forms that look great and fit your needs. It comes with a ton of templates and integrates smoothly with other apps, making it handy for everything from gathering data to handling payments.

Whether you’re an individual or part of a business, JotForm offers flexibility and features that make form-building easy.

[hashtag](https://help.lob.com/print-and-mail/integrations/api-integrations/jotform#getting-started)

Getting Started


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Lob Blog: [How Jotform and Lob Can Help You Collect Better Dataarrow-up-right](https://www.lob.com/blog/how-jotform-and-lob-can-help-you-collect-better-data)
    
*   Jotform’s Lob Address Verification widget allows your form respondents to check if they’re entering a correct address in your form’s address field. [Check out the widget herearrow-up-right](https://www.jotform.com/widgets/lob-address-verification)
    .
    
*   Alternatively, [using Zapier, set up the Jotform triggerarrow-up-right](https://zapier.com/apps/jotform/integrations/lob)
    , and make magic happen automatically in Lob.
